title: Drypetes calyptosepala

The health benefits of Drypetes calyptosepala include its use in treating fever, inflammation, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Drypetes calyptosepala is often made into herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications for skin conditions.
